title: Beille 3pc Wheat Straw Spoons and Ladle Set Cooking Baking Kitchen Utensils

Beille 3pc Wheat Straw Spoons and Ladle Set Cooking Baking Kitchen Utensils

Want to step up your cooking and meal prep game? Then you need the Beille 3pc Spoons and Ladle Set, made with sustainable wheat straw! These serving spoons are made with an innovative plant based bioplastic material called wheat straw, that mimics classic kitchen utensils without the harmful byproducts of traditional plastic. Stylish and sustainable, who says you can’t have both!

Key Features

  • WHEAT STRAW KITCHEN UTENSILS SET: Upgrade your kitchen with these sustainable and stylish wheat straw kitchen utensils from Beille; a must have set for all your cooking, baking and food prep needs
  • PLANT BASED MATERIAL: Unique kitchen ladle is made of bioplastic wheat straw, a plant based material not made from fossil fuels making it a more sustainable choice; Innovative material is a great zero waste option and is Certified BPA Free
  • SOLID AND DURABLE: Beille wheat straw spoons and ladles mimic traditional plastic cooking spoons and utensils without harmful byproducts; all kitchen utensils included in this set are dishwasher safe and can be used with both hot and cold food ingredients
  • STAINLESS STEEL HANDLE: Sturdy handle made of durable, corrosion resistant stainless steel that won’t rust; Comes with handy slot in handle for easy hang storage if preferred; Trendy speckled cream color will fit nicely with any and all kitchens
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Spoon Dimensions: 13 x 3 x 1 inches; Ladle Dimensions: 11.5 x 3.5 x 3 inches; Color: Speckled cream; Material: Bioplastic Wheat Straw, Stainless Steel; Set Weight: 0.42lbs

Product Specifications

  • MPN: CWM76RP1
  • UPC: 810131700409
  • Color: Cream
  • Size: Large

Wheat straw is a bioplastic that is not made from fossil fuels, making them more sustainable and a great zero waste option. The spoons and ladle are of course certified BPA free and food safe for all your cooking, baking and food prep needs; importantly, the set is also dishwasher safe, making for quick and easy clean up!

The kitchen utensils feature sturdy handles made of corrosion resistant stainless steel for durability and longevity in the kitchen. The handles comes with a built in slot for easy hanging storage if desired. The kitchen utensils are finished in a trendy and warm speckled cream color with matte finish, that make them an easy addition to any and all kitchens or food prep stations.

Every kitchen needs a reliable and durable set of kitchen utensils! With the Beille wheat straw plant based spoons and ladle, you can cook and meal prep with peace of mind, knowing you’re doing your part to protect yourself, your family, and the planet from harmful materials! Happy cooking!
